elements.text:
L2 Cache Store

sfc:{key} = encoded_value
TTL: 5 min (PX 300000)
Codec: msgpack (default) | json

elements.text:
Distributed Fetch Lock

sfc:lock:{key} = uuid_token
SET NX PX 30000 (30s TTL)
Token-verified ownership
elements.originalText:
Distributed Fetch Lock

elements.text:
Broadcast Stream: cache:results

Ordered, durable append-only log (MAXLEN ~10000)
Message types: value | tombstone
All instances listen from '$' — no replay, new messages only
elements.originalText:
Broadcast Stream: cache:results

Ordered, durable append-only log (MAXLEN ~10000)
Message types: value | tombstone
All instances listen from '$' — no replay, new messages only

elements.text:
Atomic Lua Scripts (EVALSHA)

CACHE_GET (2 keys)
  GET cache:{key}
  if miss: SET lock NX PX
  -> {1,val} hit | {2} locked | {3} wait

CACHE_SET (3 keys, token-gated)
  verify token -> SET val PX
  -> XADD stream -> DEL lock
  returns 0 if token mismatch (stale)

CACHE_INVALIDATE (2 keys)
  DEL cache:{key} -> XADD tombstone

CACHE_EXTEND_LOCK (1 key)
  PEXPIRE lock if token matches

CACHE_EXTEND_LOCK (1 key)

elements.text:
Protocol Steps

1. get(key) — check L1 (zero-hop)
2. L1 miss — CACHE_GET Lua
     hit(1): decode, return
     locked(2): win lock, fetch
     wait(3): await stream
3. Lock winner fetches from origin
4. CACHE_SET stores + broadcasts
5. All instances receive via stream
elements.originalText:
Protocol Steps

1. get(key) — check L1 (zero-hop)
2. L1 miss — CACHE_GET Lua
     hit(1): decode, return
     locked(2): win lock, fetch
     wait(3): await stream
3. Lock winner fetches from origin
4. CACHE_SET stores + broadcasts
5. All instances receive via stream

elements.text:
Distributed Systems Properties

Single-Flight Deduplication
  Only 1 fetch per key across cluster.
  In-process: Pending Map coalesces.
  Cross-instance: Redis lock deduplicates.

Two-Tier Consistency
  L1: Eventually consistent
       (updated via stream broadcast)
  L2: Strongly consistent
       (single Redis, atomic Lua ops)

Reliable Broadcast
  Redis Streams, not Pub/Sub.
  Ordered, durable, append-only.
  Survives consumer restarts.

Deadlock Prevention
  Lock auto-expires (30s TTL).
  Token verification on SET.
  Stale event if token mismatch.

Partition Tolerance
  5s timeout -> retry Redis GET
  -> attempt lock acquisition
  -> fetch with deadline
  AbortSignal propagation on close.

Graceful Shutdown
  AbortController signals fetchers.
  Pending waiters rejected.
  Stream listener drained.
elements.originalText:
Distributed Systems Properties

Single-Flight Deduplication
  Only 1 fetch per key across cluster.
  In-process: Pending Map coalesces.
  Cross-instance: Redis lock deduplicates.

Two-Tier Consistency
  L1: Eventually consistent
       (updated via stream broadcast)
  L2: Strongly consistent
       (single Redis, atomic Lua ops)

Reliable Broadcast
  Redis Streams, not Pub/Sub.
  Ordered, durable, append-only.
  Survives consumer restarts.

Deadlock Prevention
  Lock auto-expires (30s TTL).
  Token verification on SET.
  Stale event if token mismatch.

Partition Tolerance
  5s timeout -> retry Redis GET
  -> attempt lock acquisition
  -> fetch with deadline
  AbortSignal propagation on close.

Graceful Shutdown
  AbortController signals fetchers.
  Pending waiters rejected.
  Stream listener drained.

elements.text:
Arrow Legend
  Blue:   read path (CACHE_GET)
  Orange: write path (CACHE_SET)
  Green:  fetch from origin
  Purple: stream broadcast
elements.originalText:
Arrow Legend
  Blue:   read path (CACHE_GET)
  Orange: write path (CACHE_SET)
  Green:  fetch from origin
  Purple: stream broadcast

elements.text:
Invalidation: invalidate(key)
  1. Delete from local L1 Map
  2. CACHE_INVALIDATE Lua: DEL from Redis + XADD tombstone
  3. All instances delete from their L1 via stream listener
elements.originalText:
Invalidation: invalidate(key)
  1. Delete from local L1 Map
  2. CACHE_INVALIDATE Lua: DEL from Redis + XADD tombstone
  3. All instances delete from their L1 via stream listener

elements.text:
Tuning Parameters
  localTtl: 60s    redisTtl: 300s    lockTtl: 30s
  timeout: 5s      maxSize: unbounded  sizeThreshold: 64KB
  extendLock: false (interval at lockTtl/2 if enabled)
elements.originalText:
Tuning Parameters
